input_text: The tail of the dog of Mary was short. Any person is male or female. Daniel journeyed to the hallway. The student carrying the books greeted the teacher. The hand of a man moved a wheel. Mr Dursley is a catholic. A chocolate cake fell. The picture was painted by Leo. Agatha is in trouble. Sheep are afraid of mice. The guide offered the tourists tea. The horse kept in the stable was calm. John is nice. Mike is a boxer. The length of Nile is 10 meters. Bears eat red berries in a forest. Probably Tallinn is in Estonia. The stone was heavy. Penguins happily live in water. The chef cooked a meal for the guests. Americans cannot disappear. "Riga is outside America. Winona is a cat. The children playing in the garden laughed. The letter was written. The elephant was cool. The road leading to the village was narrow. The city was destroyed. Clinton defeated Dole. The manager, Anna, called Eve. The window was broken. Earth contains Europe. If X1 is a father of Y1 and Y1 is a father of Z1, X1 is a grandfather of Z1. Is it false that John is nice?
